name: fizzy
description: Fizzy workflows for boards, cards, comments, account setup, self-hosted management, and connector-native MCP access.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Fizzy boards, cards, comments, and workflows.
interface.longDescription: Fizzy automation for boards, cards, comments, setup, self-hosted workflows, and connector-native MCP access. Prefer available Fizzy MCP tools when already configured, and use the CLI for local shell work, setup, troubleshooting, attachments, migrations, board bootstrap, and CLI-only coverage.
defaultPrompt: List boards and summarize active work in Fizzy.
Manage Fizzy cards and comments from the CLI or available MCP tools.
